help.browser_automation.enabled: Enables the Browser Automation integration. The agent can navigate websites, fill forms, click elements, take screenshots, and extract data using an isolated Playwright sidecar container.
help.browser_automation.readonly: In read-only mode, the agent can only navigate and read page content. Form filling, clicking buttons, and file operations are blocked.
help.browser_automation.headless: Runs the browser without a visible window (recommended). Disable only for debugging purposes — the sidecar has no display output by default.
help.browser_automation.allow_file_uploa: Allows the agent to upload local files to web pages via file input fields.
help.browser_automation.allow_file_downl: Allows the agent to download files from web pages. Downloaded files are stored in the configured download directory.
help.browser_automation.mode: Operating mode for the browser automation service. Currently only 'sidecar' mode is supported, which runs Playwright in an isolated Docker container.
help.browser_automation.url: Internal URL of the Playwright sidecar service. Use the Docker container name or service name as hostname (e.g. http://browser-automation:7331).
help.browser_automation.container_name: Docker container name for the browser automation sidecar. Must be unique on your Docker host.
help.browser_automation.image: Docker image for the browser automation sidecar. Built automatically from the Dockerfile in the configured directory.
help.browser_automation.dockerfile_dir: Directory containing the Dockerfile for building the browser automation image. Default is the AuraGo install directory.
help.browser_automation.allowed_download: Directory where downloaded files are stored. Relative paths are resolved from the AuraGo data directory.
help.browser_automation.screenshots_dir: Directory where browser screenshots are saved. Relative paths are resolved from the AuraGo data directory.
help.browser_automation.session_ttl_minu: Time in minutes before an idle browser session is automatically closed. Default: 30 minutes.
help.browser_automation.max_sessions: Maximum number of concurrent browser sessions. Each session uses memory in the sidecar container. Default: 3.
help.browser_automation.viewport.width: Browser viewport width in pixels. Affects how pages are rendered. Default: 1280.
help.browser_automation.viewport.height: Browser viewport height in pixels. Affects how pages are rendered. Default: 720.
help.browser_automation.auto_build: Automatically build the Docker image if it does not exist when the sidecar is started. Disable to manage the image manually.
